name: nncckkrr.space
notes: v39.3.22l UI hotfix: lowers the kill combo box away from upgrade and screen-moment overlays, restores centered combo content, adds a small combo growth pulse, starts combo rewards/moments at x10, gives combo screen moments a distinct non-green tier color ramp with larger high-tier titles, and switches center-screen typography to thinner Silkscreen pixel text without shadows.
